---
title: "Resume"
---
::: {.page-wrap}

## Professional Summary

Marketing student pursuing a bachelor's degree in marketing with a concentration in promotional marketing. Interested in consumer behavior, advertising, audience insights, and campaign strategy.

## Education

| Degree | Year | College / Department | Institution |
|---|---:|---|---|
| Bachelor's Degree in Marketing | 2024 – Present | College of Business | Cal Poly Pomona |
| Associate's Degree in Communications | 2022 – 2024 | Communications Department | Fullerton College |

## Skills

- Content Creation
- Event Planning and Organizing
- Business communication
- Data visualization
- Quarto
- GitHub
- Google Analytics

## Marketing Experience

### Social Media Coordinator, Cesar Chavez Academy Choir  
*2026 – Present*

- Managed and created content for the choir’s social media platforms to increase awareness and engagement.
- Planned and promoted choir events, helping improve attendance and community involvement.
- Collaborated with staff and students to highlight performances and showcase choir activities online.

### Content Creator (Independent)  
*2021 – Present*

- Create and manage original digital content across social media platforms.
- Develop content focused on trends, audience engagement, and visual storytelling.
- Analyze engagement and adjust content strategies to improve reach and interaction.

## Contact

Email: savannahkani@gmail.com  


:::
